title: Boston woman charged with breaking into 2 businesses and a home in Canton
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News Police report the suspect previously threatened violence against the resident of the home she allegedly broke into.
A Roxbury Crossing woman is facing several charges after allegedly breaking into two commercial buildings and a residence in Canton, authorities said.
Officers received a report of a break-in at a Washington Street residence on Friday around 11:30 a.

title: Payton Pritchard’s huge night propels Celtics over 76ers in Game 4 blowout: 8 takeaways
author: Tom Westerholm
bullets: Boston Celtics “The amount of fans we have, how well they travel, it’s just something I’ve been fortunate enough to experience my entire career,” Jayson Tatum said.

title: Crew member missing after falling from cruise ship near Cape Cod
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News "The safety, security, and well-being of our crew is our highest priority.
Our thoughts are with the crew member's family during this difficult time," a spokesperson for Norwegian Cruise Line said.
A Norwegian Cruise Line ship.

title: Mass. police officer put on leave amid domestic violence allegations
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News Shawn Valliere, 53, allegedly put a gun into his mouth and asked his wife to pull the trigger, held his wife at gunpoint, and abused alcohol, and cocaine, police wrote in a statement of facts.
ShareSend this article to your social connections.
A Shrewsbury police officer was suspended and is facing criminal charges after he allegedly pointed a gun at his wife and threatened to shoot her.

title: Bruins need to look themselves in mirror after embarrassing performance on home ice

title: Mike Minogue wins GOP endorsement for governor in landslide
